description.value:
Prerequisite: Str 15. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Bear tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Bear, you gain +2 bonus to Grapple checks (sacred).
description.summary: Summon Bear tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Bears; +2 bonus to Grapple checks (sacred) within 50 ft of summon.
